rationale: Gov't Code §2306.040 governs a housing department's participation in legislative hearings on agency rulemaking. It has no bearing on homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: On request, the department shall participate in any public hearing conducted by a legislator to discuss a rule to be adopted by the department.
_note: No overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this legislative-hearing participation statute.
